_description: Known false positives and safe findings from util_find_address.py. An agent or human reviewer can check incoming findings against this list by matching on (filename, matched_text) to skip already-reviewed results.

false_positives.reason: Not an address. Regex captured 'Region 8 Chairman Dr. Chip Jones' — '8' is a region number and 'Dr.' is an honorific, not 'Drive'.
Not an address. '2019' is a year in a timeline table row, and 'Court' is a judicial court, not a street type.
Safe to publish. This is the 'Nebraska House,' a named historic property in downtown Appomattox — a matter of public/historical record, not a private residential address disclosure.
Safe to publish. This is the Board of Supervisors Meeting Room address (a public government building), appearing in a reference citation describing the meeting location.
Safe to publish. A state route reference describing the location of the Appomattox Rescue Squad building — a public facility, not a personal address.
